LanguageData.Make_BoS_Appalachia_T51_Power_Armor.desc: Paint a T-51 power armor with Appalachia Brotherhood Appalachia colors.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_Appalachia_T51_Power_Armor.labe: paint T-51 power armor Appalachia chapter
LanguageData.Make_BoS_Appalachia_T51_Power_Armor_Helm: Paint a T51 power armor helmet in Brotherhood Appalachia chapter colors.
Painting T51 helmet in Appalachia colors.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_Appalachia_T60_Power_Armor.desc: Paint a T-60 power armor with Appalachia Brotherhood Appalachia colors.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_Appalachia_T60_Power_Armor.labe: paint T-60 power armor Appalachia chapter
LanguageData.Make_BoS_Appalachia_T60_Power_Armor_Helm: Paint a T60 power armor helmet in Brotherhood Appalachia chapter colors.
Painting T60 helmet in Appalachia colors.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T45_Lyons_Power_Armor.descripti: Paint a T-45 power armor with Lyons Pride Brotherhood of Steel colors.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T45_Lyons_Power_Armor.label: paint T-45 power armor (Lyons Pride)
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T45_Lyons_Power_Armor_Helmet.de: Paint a T45 power armor helmet in Lyons Pride Remnants colors.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T45_Lyons_Power_Armor_Helmet.jo: Painting T45 helmet in Lyons Pride colors.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T45_Outcast_Power_Armor.descrip: Paint a T-45 power armor with Outcast Brotherhood of Steel colors.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T45_Outcast_Power_Armor.label: paint T-45 power armor (Outcast)
Paint a T45 power armor helmet in Brotherhood Outcast colors.
Painting T45 helmet in Outcast colors.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T51_Power_Armor.description: Paint a T-51 power armor with standard Brotherhood Appalachia colors.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T51_Power_Armor.label: paint T-51 power armor Appalachia chapter
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T51_Power_Armor_Helmet.descript: Paint a T51 power armor helmet in standard Brotherhood of Steel colors.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T51_Power_Armor_Helmet.jobStrin: Painting T51 helmet in BoS colors.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T51_Power_Armor_Helmet.label: paint T51 helmet (BoS standard)
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T60_Power_Armor.description: Paint a T-60 power armor with standard Brotherhood Appalachia colors.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T60_Power_Armor.label: paint T-60 power armor Appalachia chapter
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T60_Power_Armor_Helmet.descript: Paint a T60 power armor helmet in standard Brotherhood of Steel colors.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T60_Power_Armor_Helmet.jobStrin: Painting T60 helmet in BoS colors.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T60_Power_Armor_Helmet.label: paint T60 helmet (BoS standard)
LanguageData.Make_FCP_Apparel_BoS_Classic_Combat_Armo: Upgrade reinforced combat armor with Brotherhood of Steel technology and specialized components.
